universalEdges.evidence: Databricks Q3: submittals exist for all 18+ material categories — Paint/Coatings, Doors/Hardware, HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical, Concrete, Steel, Roofing, Glass, Flooring, Ceilings, Fire Protection, Elevator, Framing, Insulation, Casework, Masonry, Low Voltage
Every material submittal gets a review response — universal by definition
Specification sections exist for every material category in CSI MasterFormat
Product data submittals provide manufacturer certifications for every material type
RFIs can seek clarification about any material in the contract documents
RFIs can address scope questions for any trade on the project
Databricks: daily_log_manpower records headcount for 30+ trades at 10+ cos each (Q1 join)
Daily reports log equipment hours and activity for any mobilized equipment
Daily reports can document delivery of any material to site
Databricks: daily_log_delay has 84K material delay records across 4,351 cos — any material can be delayed
Databricks Q2: punch items span all MasterFormat divisions — any material can have closeout deficiencies
Any trade can be assigned punch list corrections
Drawing sets show the location and configuration of every material in the design
Addenda can change specifications for any material
Change directives can order modifications to any specified material
Change directives can direct scope changes to any trade
Every installed material has warranty documentation
As-built docs record final position of every installed material
O&M manuals document maintenance for all mechanical/complex materials
RFPs can solicit pricing from any trade
RFPs can solicit pricing for any material

verbGlossary.SUBMITS FOR APPROVAL: {source} presents {target} to the design team for conformance review
verbGlossary.APPROVES OR REJECTS: {source} formally accepts or returns {target} for correction
verbGlossary.DETAILS FABRICATION OF: {target} provides precise dimensions, connections, and fabrication instructions for {source}
verbGlossary.CERTIFIES PERFORMANCE OF: {target} provides manufacturer test results and compliance certifications for {source}
verbGlossary.DEMONSTRATES FINISH OF: {source} shows color, texture, or finish quality of {target} for owner and architect approval
verbGlossary.CLARIFIES REQUIREMENT FOR: {source} seeks resolution of ambiguity or missing information about {target} in contract documents
verbGlossary.CLARIFIES SCOPE FOR: {source} seeks resolution of scope boundaries or coordination responsibilities for {target}
verbGlossary.MODIFIES REQUIREMENT FOR: {source} changes specifications, quantities, or acceptance criteria for {target}
verbGlossary.SOLICITS PRICING FOR: {source} requests cost proposals for furnishing and installing {target}
verbGlossary.REPORTS DELAY OF: {source} formally communicates that {target} delivery will not meet the scheduled date
verbGlossary.LOGS HEADCOUNT OF: {source} records the number of {target} present on site for the reporting period
verbGlossary.LOGS USAGE OF: {source} records hours, mobilization status, or operational activity of {target}
verbGlossary.RECORDS DELIVERY OF: {source} documents that {target} arrived on site including quantity and condition
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS ACTIVITY OF: {source} captures narrative description of work performed by {target}
verbGlossary.DIRECTS WORK OF: {target} provides field-level direction to {source} regarding sequencing or method
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS CONDITION OF: {source} captures the visual state of {target} for quality or progress record
verbGlossary.GOVERNS OPERATION OF: {target} establishes mandatory procedures and hazard controls for {source}
verbGlossary.PERMITS OPERATION OF: {source} authorizes mobilization, erection, or operation of {target} on site
verbGlossary.INSURES OPERATION OF: {target} provides liability coverage for {source} operation on the project
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS MAINTENANCE OF: {target} provides maintenance schedules and troubleshooting procedures for {source}
verbGlossary.IDENTIFIES DEFICIENCY IN: {source} flags incomplete or non-conforming {target} requiring correction before acceptance
verbGlossary.ASSIGNS CORRECTION TO: {source} designates {target} to remedy the identified deficiency
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES REQUIREMENTS FOR: {source} defines required properties, standards, and acceptance criteria for {target}
verbGlossary.DEPICTS INSTALLATION OF: {source} shows {target} location, quantity, and configuration within the design
verbGlossary.WARRANTIES PERFORMANCE OF: {target} establishes coverage period, terms, and remedies for {source} defects

_meta.universalEdgeSemantics: Each universalEdge means: the source element connects to EVERY element in the targetGroup via the specified verb. targetGroup values: 'trades' (25 elements), 'equipment' (11 elements), 'materials' (25 elements), 'measures' (9 elements).
_meta.dataEvidence: Universal relationships validated via Databricks queries against prod_gold_ram_us01 (2-year lookback, March 2026). Q3: submittals × all 18 material categories. Q1: daily_log_manpower × 30+ trades.
_meta.edgesVsUniversal: The 'edges' array contains SELECTIVE relationships — source elements that connect to specific targets only (e.g., shop drawings for fabricated materials, sample submittals for finish materials). Universal edges are in 'universalEdges'.
